prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: PFT-PFHRAPEP-BUN-2PC-24X36-WHT-BNDL Product Type: PLANNER Brand (from catalog): ironcompany Existing Title: (2 Pack) Productive Fitness Heart Rate and Perceived Exertion Posters Description: Exercise safely with the Productive Fitness Heart Rate and Perceived Exertion Poster Set.

This set comes with one Fitness Heart Rate Poster and one Rating of Perceived Exertion poster. The heart rate poster will help you determine what training zone you are in by cross-referencing your heart rate and your age. This will allow you to know whether you're working too hard or not enough.

The rating of perceived exertion and talk test poster provides an easy way to tell if you are training in the correct heart rate zone without actually taking your heart rate. This simple chart format uses different factors to determine your intensity level, including how difficult it is to talk while exercising and your perception of how hard you're working.

Each poster is 24" x 36" and is laminated for protection, making this set a perfect addition to any gym or home gym. Search Terms: personal trainer gym equipment exercise muscle groups workout Features: - 2 Piece Poster Set: Heart Rate & Rating of Perceived Exertion - Size of Each Poster: 24" x 36" - Lamination: Yes - Colorful Illustrations - Perfect Addition to Any Gym or Home Gym === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
